title: TheoryForge Discovery Operator (DRAFT / UNFROZEN)
description: Draft contract for a discovery operator. See 00_FIRST_RESPONSE.md §4. This schema is a proposal, not frozen; field names may change at P0/P2.

input_types.description: MIRADOR object types this operator consumes.

preconditions.description: Named predicates over (input cells, Evidence Bundle) that must hold before transform runs.

output_state.description: The only states an operator may emit. NEVER a promoted/audited state — TheoryForge has no promotion authority.

output_types.description: MIRADOR object types this operator may produce.

validators.description: Cheap self-checks run before emission (e.g. IR grammar type-check, exact-arithmetic witness re-check, non-collision).

signature.description: Detectable condition that identifies this failure.

emit_instead.description: What is emitted on this failure (e.g. a bounded-search barrier note) — never silence.

genealogy_fields.description: Provenance recorded on every emitted candidate cell.
